title: Witnessing a Traffic Accident 看到交通事故
scene: Eric在路上看到一辆车撞到了自行车，赶紧过去帮忙。

lines.en: Officer! There was an accident over there!
lines.zh: 警察叔叔！那边出事故了！

lines.en: Are you hurt? Can you tell me what happened?
lines.zh: 你受伤了吗？能告诉我发生了什么吗？

lines.en: I am fine. A car hit a man on a bicycle.
lines.zh: 我没事。一辆汽车撞了一个骑自行车的人。

lines.en: Right at the corner of Main Street and Park Road.
lines.zh: 就在主街和公园路的拐角处。

lines.en: He can stand but his knee is bleeding.
lines.zh: 他能站起来但膝盖在流血。

lines.en: Thank you for telling me. I will go there right now.
lines.zh: 谢谢你告诉我。我马上过去。

lines.en: Good. You did the right thing by coming to me.
